top_signals.title: U.S. launches airstrikes against Iran after Tehran attacks container ship in Hormuz, Pentagon says
top_signals.summary: Iran has attacked ships using a route along Oman's coast protected by the U.S. military. Tehran demands vessels use a northern route through its waters.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Vanessa Lawrence, Andrew Halford and Iain Mackay reappointed on UK Government Investments Board
top_signals.summary: His Majesty’s Treasury (HMT) has today announced the reappointment of Dr Vanessa Lawrence CB, Andrew Halford and Iain Mackay as Non-Executive Directors of UK Government Investments (UKGI).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin nearing late stages of bear market: Jamie Coutts, Real Vision
top_signals.summary: Real Vision chief crypto analyst Jamie Coutts said it's far too early to call $1 million by 2030, but he's confident Bitcoin could climb up to $250,000 over the next couple of years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Piero Cipollone: The digital transformation of money, payments and finance
